content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach makes multiple specific, well-timed reads that change the direction of the conversation. Turn 6 names the linguistic caveat ('that's just kind of how it's been') as 'a door closing' and tracks how the tiredness was about to speak before being quieted — a precise read of the said-vs-shown gap. Turn 8 catches the qualifying/hedging move ('You don't have to qualify that'). Turn 10 reframes the read of what's actually at stake (identity, not the boundary). Turn 14 names the rush/deflection signature in real time ('notice how fast you went there — almost like staying with what you didn't choose was a little too much to sit with'). Reads consistently precede the questions rather than being blind inquiries, and they target the AoA-relevant signatures: linguistic caveat, the qualifier, the move-away-from-self.",
  "evidence_turns": [6, 8, 10, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Content-level opener, no read named."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Invites somatic contact with the 'emptied out' feeling — implicit read of the felt sense, though not yet a named read of stance."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Specific linguistic-caveat read: names 'that's just kind of how it's been' as 'a door closing' and tracks what the tiredness was about to say. Read precedes question."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the qualifying/hedging move ('You don't have to qualify that') — catching the defensive disclaimer in real time."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reframes via a read of what's actually loaded: not the boundary but the identity meaning. Pattern-level read."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Warm reflection, then a question; less of a specific read here."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the rush/deflection signature timely: 'notice how fast you went there' — read precedes the inquiry."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["linguistic-caveat"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "Reads are visible, specific, and timely. Coach distinguished said from shown repeatedly."
}
